name: venus-ads-v3-6
description: OctoBus package for Venus ADS V3.6 blacklist login, batch block, remove, and logout workflows.

Venus_ADS_V36.VenusADSBlacklistService/B.name: batch-block-ip
Venus_ADS_V36.VenusADSBlacklistService/B.description: Log in to Venus ADS V3.6, batch block IP addresses, and log out.

Venus_ADS_V36.VenusADSBlacklistService/R.name: remove-blocked-ip
Venus_ADS_V36.VenusADSBlacklistService/R.description: Log in to Venus ADS V3.6, remove one blocked IP, and log out.
